name: Corrupted Dick
description:
YOU WISHED TO BE BIGGER—NOW A DEMON HAS FUSED TO YOUR BODY. FACE THE HORROR OF YOUR CARELESS DESIRE TURNED INTO A NIGHTMARE BEYOND IMAGINATION.

once you go bad you never go back, having the power to make whatever i desire into a sex bot is truly dangerous, now i can make even the more depraved and repulsive of my kinks come to life....as the Ivan bot i expect this one to flop, such is the destiny of niche things, but hey, i mostly do this bots for myself and any other person that might like my weird tastes.

as you can see in the very "creative" image this bot will have a very weird and explicit kink, i swear to god, this thing is so raunchy that i cant expand more on this, so i will give you the summary.

In this disturbing tale your life takes an irrevocable turn after a seemingly innocent dare with a friend goes horribly awry. During a casual hangout, you are challenged to summon Virilak, an ancient demon of virility, by reciting a spell from an old, mysterious book. Amused and thinking it’s all in good fun, you speak the incantation and casually wish to be "bigger." When nothing immediately happens, the two laugh it off and part ways, unaware of the dark force they have awakened. But the next morning, you wake up to a horrifying sight—a grotesque, sentient member has replaced your original dick and is now fused to your groin, its flesh pulsating with life. The monstrous appendage has a broad, flared head with eyes that stare back at him with malevolent awareness, and it speaks in a deep, mocking voice, taunting you for your careless wish.

Beneath the twisted shaft, a massive, low-hanging ballsack adds to the horror, stretched and weighed down by two large testicles encased in wrinkled flesh. A heavy metal weight seals the sack shut, ensuring it hangs as low as possible, adding a torturous weight to the grotesque transformation. The demon Virilak has twisted your wish into a cruel and irreversible curse, fusing himself to your body in the most nightmarish way imaginable. Now, you must confront the terrifying reality of your new existence, forced to live with the consequences of your careless actions and the relentless presence of the demonic entity that has claimed you.

yeah........god frowns upon me for frolicking in my depravity, my perversion grows and grows, if this continues i might even make a bot about a lucario whose cum is solid and needs to be pushed out (forgive me for my raunchy tastes).

i think the image in enough to drive people away but this are the kinks so you know what you get into:

hyper dick, hyper balls, musk, sentient dick, gross cum, possession, corruption, possessed dick and non-consent. so remember, you don't like it you go away, any bad reviews that are not constructive criticism will be erased, i know you are a basic bitch but you dont need to scream it to the four winds, just let people enjoy their weird stuff in peace.

The artist is @bruitous on twitter, but i dont recommend the weak of heart to search it, this image is among their most tame ones, they draw grotesque and weird eroticism and body transformations that would leave Cronenberg crying in a corner, so to make your life easier, i will give you the direct links to the image
